What We Bake

The Menu

Every item is made to order in small batches. Nothing sits on a shelf — it goes straight from Lisa's oven to your hands.

Double Chocolate Chip Cookie
Loaded with white and dark chocolate chips tucked into a buttery golden dough. The one that started it all.

Twix-Style Caramel & Chocolate Cookie

The Leftover One
Kitchen Sink Cookie

The Golden One
Chocolate Chip Blondie

The Original One
Sourdough Round

The Dimpled One
Sourdough Focaccia
Olive-oiled, dimpled, scattered with rosemary and sea salt. A sourdough base gives it tang and chew you won't find anywhere else.
From 2 per sheet

Our Story

A family behind every batch

The One with the Oven was born in Lisa's kitchen — with Maddy sneaking cookie dough off the spatula and Cooper declaring himself official brownie taste-tester. What started as weekend baking became something the whole neighborhood couldn't stop talking about.

Everything is made by hand, in small batches, with real ingredients. No shortcuts, no preservatives — just the kind of love that only happens when you bake for the people you care about most.

Every recipe starts the same way — Maddy and Cooper tell me what they want, and I figure out how to make it unforgettable.

— Lisa, Baker & Mom

100%

Orders

Something delicious is coming

The oven is warming up. Lisa is perfecting every recipe, and orders will be opening very soon. Be the first to know — drop your email and we'll reach out the moment we're ready to bake for you.
